title: Senior Software Engineer - Intel India Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Intel India Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Intel India Digital Technologies in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Intel India Digital Technologies:
Intel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India Digital Technologies!
